{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Assembly Station B-4773
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Assembly Station B-4773]] is the name of the station being visited.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c11">''The Pilot'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“Assembly Station B-4773. Would you like a tour of the facility?”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
